name: The Fixer
text:
{T}, Sacrifice a Favor token: Choose one —
• Destroy target Treasure.
• Tap target creature.
• A problem of yours goes away. Exile target creature you control, then return it tapped at end of turn.
The Fixer makes things go away. Things, problems, people. Whatever's on the list.
flavorText: You don't call the Fixer. The Fixer is already in your kitchen.
